reason: This finding involves enabling FIPS mode by setting the 'crypto.fips_enabled' kernel parameter. According to the description, FIPS mode can only be enabled during system installation with the fips=1 kernel flag and is not supported on preexisting systems. Attempting remediation on an installed system is explicitly stated as unsupported and could cause system instability or breakage, aligning with the 'too_dangerous_to_remediate' category for FIPS changes.
estimated_impact: reboot required; System instability if modified on preexisting system; Potential data loss or service disruption; Permanent finding if failed on installed system
